name: Ecopipam
description: Ecopipam has been used in trials studying the treatment of Tourette's Syndrome, Lesch-Nyhan Disease, Pathological Gambling, and Self-injurious Behavior.

interactions.name: Thalidomide
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Thalidomide.

interactions.name: Vemurafenib
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Vemurafenib is combined with Ecopipam.

interactions.name: Amisulpride
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the antipsychotic activities of Amisulpride.

interactions.name: Metoclopramide
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Metoclopramide is combined with Ecopipam.

interactions.name: Sulpiride
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the antipsychotic activities of Sulpiride.

interactions.name: Azelastine
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Azelastine.

interactions.name: Droperidol
interactions.description: Droperidol may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Ecopipam.

interactions.name: Hydrocodone
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Hydrocodone.

interactions.name: Methotrimeprazine
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Methotrimeprazine.

interactions.name: Orphenadrine

interactions.name: Paraldehyde

interactions.name: Suvorexant
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Suvorexant.

interactions.name: Tapentadol
interactions.description: Tapentadol may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Ecopipam.

interactions.name: Zolpidem
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Zolpidem.

interactions.name: Mequitazine
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the arrhythmogenic activities of Mequitazine.

interactions.name: Buprenorphine
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Buprenorphine.

interactions.name: Hydroxyzine

interactions.name: Magnesium Sulfate

interactions.name: Methoxyphenamine
interactions.description: Ecopipam may decrease the stimulatory activities of Methoxyphenamine.

interactions.name: Gepefrine
interactions.description: Ecopipam may decrease the stimulatory activities of Gepefrine.

interactions.name: Ethanol
interactions.description: Ecopipam may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Ethanol.

interactions.name: Brimonidine
interactions.description: Brimonidine may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Ecopipam.

interactions.name: Dapoxetine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Ecopipam is combined with Dapoxetine.

interactions.name: Indalpine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Ecopipam is combined with Indalpine.

interactions.name: Zimelidine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Ecopipam is combined with Zimelidine.

interactions.name: Etoperidone
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Ecopipam is combined with Etoperidone.

interactions.name: Alaproclate
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Ecopipam is combined with Alaproclate.

interactions.name: Doxylamine
interactions.description: Doxylamine may increase the central nervous system depressant (CNS depressant) activities of Ecopipam.
